# awesome-mcp-servers PR Template

## PR Title

```
Add makz81/spendlog-mcp server
```

## Entry (goes into "Finance & Fintech" section, alphabetically)

```markdown
- [makz81/spendlog-mcp](https://github.com/makz81/spendlog-mcp) 📇 🏠 🍎 🪟 🐧 - Expense tracking and invoicing for freelancers. 42 MCP tools: budgets, recurring transactions, tax export, PDF invoices. Local SQLite, EN/DE.
```

## Steps

1. Fork `punkpeye/awesome-mcp-servers`
2. Edit README.md → find `### 💰 Finance & Fintech` section
3. Insert entry alphabetically (after `l*`, before `n*` entries)
4. Open PR with title above

## Notes

- Verify GitHub repo is public first
- Emoji legend: 📇=TypeScript, 🏠=Local, 🍎=macOS, 🪟=Windows, 🐧=Linux
